description: AI-powered signal generation, cross-asset analysis, and scenario modeling for real-time trading intelligence

agents.name: Signal Generator
agents.description: Scans market data streams, detects technical and fundamental signals, and quantifies signal strength across asset classes in real time

agents.name: Cross Asset Analyst
agents.description: Identifies cross-asset correlations, divergences, and arbitrage opportunities spanning equities, fixed income, commodities, and FX

agents.name: Scenario Modeler
agents.description: Constructs probabilistic scenario outcomes using Monte Carlo simulation, stress testing, and macro regime analysis
